steps.title: Create product from Seller
steps.summary: Seller authentication, store context, image upload, and draft creation completed.

steps.title: Save as draft and check DB/API response
steps.summary: Draft state is consistent across seller API and database, and remains hidden from public client APIs.

steps.title: Publish product
steps.summary: Seller publish succeeded and persisted active/public product state.

responseVisibility.label: Published
responseVisibility.storefrontReason: Public storefront queries include this product because publish is on, status is active, and the store is operational.
responseVisibility.sellerHint: Seller and customer views are aligned for visibility.

operationalReadiness.label: Operational
operationalReadiness.description: This store has an active approved payment setup and can be treated as operational on public store-facing lanes.

steps.title: Open Client and check product appears
